description.value: Killer and hero adored by thousands, facing death on arena sands; may be slave, POW, criminal, or voluntary pursuer of glory and fame.

system.occupationSkillPoints: EDU x 2 + (STR x 2 for Scutarii/Heavy or DEX x 2 for Parmularii/Light)

contacts.value: Other gladiators, trainers, promoters, fans of the games (which could be anyone)

coc7-cthulhu-invictus.specialNotes: Scutarii types include Provocator, Secutor, Murmillo. Parmularii types include Hoplomachus, Thracian, Retiarius.
